query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white close-up of a human eye partially visible through a narrow vertical slit or gap, surrounded by soft skin and shadowed edges that obscure much of the surrounding face.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred and low-contrast black-and-white partial view of an eye seen through a narrow dark slit, with most of the face obscured by shadow and extreme blur that dissolves fine details into mushy gray tones, creating an oppressive, anxious atmosphere where the subject appears hidden or trapped.
